items.title: DASHBOARD PANEL CMS
items.subtitle: 2025 | Yukti ID
items.heading: DASHBOARD PANEL WEBSITE FOR CONTENT MANAGEMENT SYSTEM
items.description: Built with Next.js, ShadCN UI, Tailwind CSS, React Hook Form, Zod, CropperJS, and Axios. A fast, secure, and flexible CMS replacement for WordPress.

items.title: CMS & BLOGPAGE REST API
items.subtitle: 2025 | Yukti ID
items.heading: BACKEND DEVELOPMENT FOR CMS DASHBOARD BLOG SYSTEM
items.description: Built with Express.js, TypeScript, and Prisma ORM. Features secure authentication, JWT authorization, Bcrypt encryption, and Sharp for image processing.

items.title: BLOGPAGE NEWS MEDIA
items.subtitle: 2025 | Yukti ID · On Going
items.heading: MODERN NEWS BLOGPAGE WITH NEXT.JS SSR AND TYPESCRIPT
items.description: High-performance news blog platform built with Next.js and TypeScript, leveraging SSR for optimal data fetching and SEO. Seamless integration with the CMS backend API.

shortBiography_1: My name is {{name}}, but you can call me <highlight>{{nickname}}</highlight>. I am {{age}} years old, based in Malang, East Java. I am an IT Enthusiast with nearly 10 years of experience in networking, infrastructure, and IT systems development.
shortBiography_2: My career began at PT. Telkom Akses, where I handled fiber optic-based networks, service provisioning, and led a team of field technicians to maintain service stability and customer satisfaction across East Java.
shortBiography_3: I expanded my expertise into web development through an internship at <highlight>Yukti ID</highlight>, where I developed a full-stack blog platform using Next.js, Express.js, and MySQL — building a CMS dashboard and backend API for a media company.
shortBiography_4: I further sharpened my skills through an intensive 6-month bootcamp at Harisenin.com, covering frontend, backend, databases, and software engineering fundamentals — successfully transitioning from network infrastructure into software development.
shortBiography_5: Currently, I work at PT. Gudang Baru Berkah as a DevSecOps Infrastructure Engineer, handling all aspects of IT infrastructure — from inter-branch network design and server virtualization (Proxmox, VMware, Hyper-V, Kubernetes), to monitoring & observability using Grafana Stack and Zabbix.
shortBiography_6: I also maintain a SOC stack (Wazuh, TheHive, Cortex, MISP, Kafka), IP management (phpIPAM), and internal services such as PBX, DNS, and ticketing systems. I continuously develop myself in automation, security, and infrastructure-as-code, while studying SD-WAN, ZTNA, and NAC concepts.
shortBiography_7: I am always open to collaboration and knowledge sharing. If you are interested in working together, feel free to reach out through the {{contact}} section below.
shortBiography_8: This website was built inspired by Frans Jesky on {{name}}.

current.title: PT. Gudang Baru Berkah
current.description: As a DevOps and Network Engineer, responsible for deployment, management, and automation of various company IT services and infrastructure, with a focus on system stability, security, and efficiency.

responsibilities.title: Proxmox & Bare Metal Management
responsibilities.details: Installation, configuration, and management of bare metal servers using Proxmox VE as the primary virtualization platform for various internal company services.

responsibilities.title: Monitoring & Observability
responsibilities.details: Deployed and integrated Prometheus and Grafana Stack to monitor infrastructure, network, and application performance. Built automated alerting systems to Microsoft Teams.

responsibilities.title: Internal Telecommunications
responsibilities.details: Setup and maintenance of Issabel-based IP Phone PBX, including inter-branch integration and extension configuration for internal communications.

responsibilities.title: IT Asset Management
responsibilities.details: Implementation and maintenance of OCS Inventory integrated with GLPI for IT asset management, device inventory, and asset lifecycle recording.

responsibilities.title: IP & Network Management
responsibilities.details: Deployed and maintained phpIPAM for IP address management, subnet, and VLAN segmentation across the entire company network.

responsibilities.title: Containerization & Microservices
responsibilities.details: Built and managed Kubernetes cluster environments for microservices deployment. Performed scaling, load balancing, and container-based application orchestration.

responsibilities.title: Ingress & Reverse Proxy
responsibilities.details: Configured Traefik and Nginx as reverse proxy and ingress controllers for HTTP/HTTPS routing, TLS termination, and multi-application domain management.

responsibilities.title: Security & High Availability
responsibilities.details: Ensured systems remain secure and highly available through server hardening, network segmentation, and backup automation. Also built SOC stack with Wazuh, TheHive, Cortex, MISP, and Kafka.

internship.title: Yukti ID
internship.description: Developed a full-stack blog platform for a media company over 4 months. Solely responsible for designing, developing, and deploying three main platform components — with regular planning sessions and weekly reviews with the software house owner.

responsibilities.title: Content Management Dashboard
responsibilities.details: Built a CRUD content dashboard with role-based authentication using Next.js, enabling editors to manage articles, categories, and media assets. Deployed at y-dashboard-delta.vercel.app

responsibilities.title: Backend API Development
responsibilities.details: Developed a REST API backend using Express.js and TypeScript to handle data management, authentication, and business logic with structured endpoints. Deployed at backend-sable-mu.vercel.app

responsibilities.title: Frontend Development
responsibilities.details: Developed the public-facing frontend interface using Next.js for content access, article listing, and user interaction with server-side rendering.

responsibilities.title: Database Management
responsibilities.details: Designed and managed MySQL database schema for content storage, user roles, and relational data with proper indexing and query optimization.

bootcamp.title: Harisenin.com
bootcamp.description: Joined an intensive 6-month fullstack web developer bootcamp focusing on practical skills for software engineering. The program provided a strong foundation in web development covering front-end, back-end, and technology project management.

responsibilities.title: Fundamental Software Engineering
responsibilities.details: Basic principles of software engineering — writing efficient code, debugging, and problem-solving strategies as the foundation for building applications.

responsibilities.title: Fullstack Web Concepts
responsibilities.details: Understanding how all parts of a website work together, including developing both client-side (front-end) and server-side (back-end) in one integrated application.

responsibilities.title: Frontend Development
responsibilities.details: Building responsive and interactive UIs using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js with component-based architecture.

responsibilities.title: Backend Development
responsibilities.details: Building server-side applications and REST APIs using Node.js and Express.js with proper routing, middleware, and error handling.

responsibilities.title: Version Control with Git
responsibilities.details: Using Git for code management, tracking changes, branching strategies, and collaborative workflows using GitHub.

responsibilities.title: Database Management
responsibilities.details: Designing and managing relational databases with MySQL, including schema design, normalization, queries, and ORM usage.

responsibilities.title: React.js & State Management
responsibilities.details: Building modern SPAs with React.js, managing global state, component lifecycle, hooks, and integrating with REST APIs.

responsibilities.title: Authentication & Authorization
responsibilities.details: Implementing secure user authentication using JWT, session management, and role-based access control in full-stack applications.

experience.years: 8 yr 9 months · Contract · East Java, Indonesia

teamLeader.title: PT. Telkom Akses
teamLeader.description: Led a team of field technicians responsible for provisioning and migration of fiber optic-based internet services. Ensured daily order completion targets were consistently met while maintaining high service quality and customer satisfaction.

responsibilities.title: Team Coordination
responsibilities.details: Distributed and controlled daily work orders to the technician team, setting completion deadlines and ensuring minimum 85% daily completion rate.

responsibilities.title: Performance Monitoring
responsibilities.details: Built internal dashboards and conducted evaluations to monitor team performance and maintain consistent order completion rates.

responsibilities.title: Quality Control
responsibilities.details: Conducted quality control inspections and spot checks on technician installations to verify installation quality, feasibility, and positive customer experience.

responsibilities.title: Resource Assessment
responsibilities.details: Conducted routine assessments per company schedule to ensure readiness of work tools and human resources for field operations.

responsibilities.title: Reporting
responsibilities.details: Provided regular performance reports to senior management regarding daily order completion status, team issues, and operational improvements.

helpdesk.title: PT. Telkom Akses
helpdesk.description: Served as the operational backbone between customer registration and field technician deployment for service migration. Managed data flow, ticket distribution, and service activation to ensure seamless customer onboarding.

responsibilities.title: Ticket Distribution
responsibilities.details: Distributed customer registration tickets and assisted field technicians with technical data management for efficient order processing.

responsibilities.title: Customer Data Management
responsibilities.details: Managed prospective customer data and collaborated with other units to resolve technical and administrative issues.

responsibilities.title: Service Activation
responsibilities.details: Performed service activations by configuring network devices and ensuring services functioned correctly per ticket specifications.

responsibilities.title: Customer Communication
responsibilities.details: Communicated with customers via messaging and phone to provide ticket updates, schedule appointments, and confirm service activations.

Ioan.title: PT. Telkom Akses
Ioan.description: Field technician responsible for customer-side technical troubleshooting and network repairs within the assigned work area, with a maximum repair time of 3 hours from ticket opening.

responsibilities.title: Technical Troubleshooting
responsibilities.details: Received orders and performed customer-side technical troubleshooting, resolving network issues within a maximum 3-hour repair window from ticket opening.

responsibilities.title: Corrective & Preventive Maintenance
responsibilities.details: Performed corrective and preventive maintenance on network infrastructure within the work area to minimize service disruptions.

responsibilities.title: Equipment Maintenance
responsibilities.details: Conducted routine maintenance on production equipment, cleaning and resolving cable issues with a target of 0 incidents.

responsibilities.title: Fiber Optic Handling
responsibilities.details: Applied OTDR, fusion splicing, and FTTx installation techniques for fiber optic network installation and troubleshooting.

dshr.title: PT. Telkom Akses
dshr.description: Handled rapid WiFi system installations with a one-day service model to increase customer satisfaction targets.

responsibilities.title: WiFi Installation
responsibilities.details: Performed WiFi system installations with a one-day service commitment to improve customer satisfaction metrics.

responsibilities.title: Customer Acquisition
responsibilities.details: Assisted in acquiring new customers, supporting registration processes, and performing initial service activations.

provisioning.title: PT. Telkom Akses
provisioning.description: Entry-level technician responsible for WiFi service installation with daily order targets, ensuring customers could fully utilize their services after activation.

responsibilities.title: Service Installation
responsibilities.details: Completed WiFi service installation orders with a minimum daily target of 3 installations, ensuring quality and timely delivery.

responsibilities.title: Customer Education
responsibilities.details: Provided service information to customers and ensured they could optimally use their new services after installation.

responsibilities.title: Technical Guarantee
responsibilities.details: Educated customers on the 60-day technical warranty, payment methods, and the process for reporting service disruptions.

responsibilities.title: Fiber Optic Skills
responsibilities.details: Applied fusion splicing and FTTx installation techniques for fiber-to-the-home service deployments.

education.title: SMK Muhammadiyah 1 Kepanjen
education.description: Graduated from SMK Muhammadiyah 1 Kepanjen majoring in Computer and Network Engineering. During this time, participated in the Student Competency Competition (LKS) at the provincial level in East Java, sparking a deep interest in IT and networking.

responsibilities.title: Student Competency Competition (LKS)
responsibilities.details: Participated in the provincial-level IT competency competition in East Java, gaining competitive exposure to networking and systems.

responsibilities.title: Network Infrastructure
responsibilities.details: Studied computer networking fundamentals including LAN/WAN topology, IP addressing, routing, and structured cabling.

responsibilities.title: Linux & Server Administration
responsibilities.details: Learned Ubuntu and Debian server administration including proxy, DNS, subdomain, DHCP, and firewall configuration.

responsibilities.title: Hardware & Troubleshooting
responsibilities.details: Hands-on experience assembling PCs, understanding computer components, and performing hardware diagnostics.
